informationWeCollect.heading: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.item1: Personal identification information (name, email, phone number)

howWeUseYourInformation.heading: How We Use Your Information
howWeUseYourInformation.item2: Communicate about your stay and services
howWeUseYourInformation.item3: Improve our services and guest experience

informationSharing.heading: Information Sharing
informationSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with trusted partners who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, provided they agree to keep this information confidential.

dataSecurity.heading: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. Your data is stored on secure servers and is only accessible by authorized personnel.

contactUs.heading: Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at reservations@goldenmile.com or call +852 2369 3111.

acceptanceOfTerms.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.content: By accessing and using the Golden Mile Hotel website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

descriptionOfService.heading: Description of Service
descriptionOfService.content: Golden Mile Hotel provides online booking services, accommodation, dining, and related hospitality services through our website and affiliated platforms.

userResponsibilities.heading: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.item2: Maintain the confidentiality of your account
userResponsibilities.item3: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
userResponsibilities.item4: Respect the rights of other guests and staff

bookingAndCancellation.heading: Booking and Cancellation
bookingAndCancellation.item1: All bookings are subject to availability
bookingAndCancellation.item2: Cancellation policies vary by rate and season

limitationOfLiability.heading: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content: Golden Mile Hotel shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

modifications.heading: Modifications
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to the website.

governingLaw.heading: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.

whatAreCookies.heading: What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better browsing experience.

typesOfCookies.heading: Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.item1: Essential cookies - Required for website functionality
typesOfCookies.item2: Analytics cookies - Help us understand website usage
typesOfCookies.item4: Marketing cookies - Used for targeted advertising

managingCookies.heading: Managing Cookies
managingCookies.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.

thirdPartyCookies.heading: Third-Party Cookies
thirdPartyCookies.content: We may use third-party services that place cookies on your device. These services have their own privacy policies.

updates.heading: Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Please check this page periodically for changes.

ourCommitment.heading: Our Commitment
ourCommitment.content: Golden Mile Hotel is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone.

assistiveTechnologies.heading: Assistive Technologies
assistiveTechnologies.content: Our website is designed to be compatible with assistive technologies, including screen readers, magnification software, and voice recognition software.

feedback.heading: Feedback
feedback.content: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of our website. Please contact us at accessibility@goldenmile.com if you encounter any accessibility barriers.

continuousImprovement.heading: Continuous Improvement
continuousImprovement.content: We are committed to ongoing improvements to ensure our website remains accessible to all users.

ourStory.heading: Our Story
ourStory.content: Since 1975, Golden Mile Hotel has been a landmark of luxury hospitality in Hong Kong. Located in the heart of Tsim Sha Tsui, we have welcomed guests from around the world with our signature blend of traditional elegance and modern comfort.

ourMission.heading: Our Mission
ourMission.content: To provide exceptional hospitality experiences that exceed expectations, creating lasting memories for every guest through personalized service and attention to detail.

whyChooseUs.heading: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.item1: Prime location in Tsim Sha Tsui

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.content: We would love to hear from you. Reach us at info@goldenmile.com or call +852 2369 3111.

luxuryAccommodations.heading: Luxury Accommodations
luxuryAccommodations.content: Each of our rooms and suites is designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and style, featuring premium amenities and stunning views of Hong Kong.

culinaryExcellence.heading: Culinary Excellence
culinaryExcellence.content: Experience award-winning cuisine at our restaurants, where our chefs blend traditional techniques with innovative approaches to create unforgettable dining experiences.

casualDining.heading: Casual Dining
casualDining.item2: Café Oriental - Light meals and pastries

privateDining.heading: Private Dining
privateDining.content: Our private dining rooms offer intimate settings for special occasions, business dinners, and celebrations. Custom menus available upon request.

dietaryRequirements.heading: Dietary Requirements
dietaryRequirements.item2: Halal and kosher meals upon request

versatileSpaces.heading: Versatile Event Spaces
versatileSpaces.content: From intimate board meetings to grand celebrations, our flexible event spaces can accommodate gatherings of all sizes with state-of-the-art technology and impeccable service.
